choices.text: Launched 1977; still operating 47+ years later. Voyager 1 entered interstellar space (2012); 24B+ km from Earth. RTG-powered (Pu-238). Visited Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune via grand tour 175-year alignment. Carries Golden Record.

Challenger 1986: O-ring + cold launch decision under schedule pressure. Columbia 2003: foam strike at launch ignored. Mars Climate Orbiter 1999: metric/imperial unit mismatch. Common thread: conservative design + cross-checks + listen to engineers.

questions.explanation: Pressure + ignored warnings + unit errors = loss.
